name: Sprint 7
goal: Fix the migrate settings-rewrite defect a consumer Instance hit (EXEC-086/087), split the Setup Grill out of the Work Grill (EXEC-083/084), and stamp a CLI quick-reference README into the invariant layout (EXEC-082).

shipped.title: EXEC-086: scope migrate's settings.json rewrite to files it renamed; report dead commands instead of repointing them
shipped.summary: Scope migrateHookLayout's HOOK_COMMAND_REWRITE to exactly the hooks migrate renamed (this or a prior run); report — never rewrite — settings commands pointing at skipped or untracked .js hooks. Confirm or refute the stale-twins hypothesis in the repro. P1 live defect in published 0.5.3 silently killing consumer custom hooks; leads the sprint.

shipped.title: EXEC-082: stamp a CLI quick-reference README into the invariant layout
shipped.summary: Add src/template/.excn/README.md (≤30 lines): one line per CLI verb (init, update, migrate, doctor, view-status, validate) leading with the npm-install-stamps-nothing gotcha. Stamped by init, delivered by update, root mirrored Src-First.

shipped.title: EXEC-087: doctor names dead settings commands and .js/.cjs hook twins
shipped.summary: Extend doctor's per-feature hook health to report each settings.json command whose target file is missing (BROKEN) and each hook present under both .js and .cjs (naming which one settings invokes), covering custom commands too. depends_on EXEC-086.

shipped.title: EXEC-083: Setup Grill content moves into the Setup Skill bundle; execution-grill-with-docs serves the Work Grill only
shipped.summary: Move the setup-interview content into src/SKILL.md's own npm bundle so the Setup Skill stops invoking the Work-Grill-specific execution-grill-with-docs; SKILL.md works standalone for an npm-path adopter. execution-grill-with-docs stays byte-unchanged.

shipped.title: EXEC-084: doc sweep — the two grills' descriptions stop implying a shared skill
shipped.summary: After EXEC-083, sweep CONTEXT.md, PROCESS.md, and their template seeds so each grill's docs name only its own skill(s); chartered persistent-doc edits travel the alignment gate. depends_on EXEC-083.

decisions.title: S7-3 execution routing: team-lead ownership of src/template content
decisions.summary: S7-3 (EXEC-082, src/template content) was executed by team-lead although the item's owner field reads builder, because TEAM_DIRECTIVE.md's roster forbids builder from src/template content and owns it to the Team Lead. Date 2026-06-12.

decisions.title: EXEC-083 acceptance-criteria ruling: AC-1 and AC-3 read together
decisions.summary: EXEC-083 AC-1 ('no longer invokes or references execution-grill-with-docs') and AC-3 ('references the stamped CONTEXT-FORMAT.md by explicit path' — a path inside that skill's directory) conflict on a strict reading. Team Lead ruled them read-together: no skill invocations, and the two mandated format-doc paths (CONTEXT-FORMAT.md, ADR-FORMAT.md) are required citations. Alignment upheld the ruling at the S7-4 SKILL.md gate. Date 2026-06-12.

decisions.title: S7-4 gate routing: code-standards skipped, alignment as the content gate
decisions.summary: S7-4 edited src/SKILL.md (skill content, not code), so code-standards — whose rubric is .excn/CODE_STANDARDS.md, scoped to code — was skipped; package-qa (stamp/pack contract) and alignment ran instead, with alignment applied as the universal content gate for sprint-significant skill-doc edits. Date 2026-06-12.

decisions.title: Gate sequencing: package-qa held for a quiet tree, combined-tree gating
decisions.summary: package-qa runs were held until the working tree was quiet (no in-flight builder edits) and gated combined trees — S7-1+S7-3 together; the S7-4 run re-verified the EXEC-086/087 contract checks still green — following the sprint-5/6 combined-gating precedent. Date 2026-06-12.

retrospective_notes.title: Issue owners were filed against a single role, not the directive roster
retrospective_notes.body: All five sprint items carried owner 'builder' at filing, but TEAM_DIRECTIVE.md forbids builder from src/template content (S7-3/EXEC-082) and persistent docs (S7-5/EXEC-084); two of five were rerouted mid-sprint (S7-3 to team-lead, S7-5 to scribe). The gap is that owner fields were set without reference to the directive roster's ownership boundaries at filing time.

retrospective_notes.title: EXEC-083's acceptance criteria contradicted each other
retrospective_notes.body: EXEC-083 AC-1 (no longer references execution-grill-with-docs) and AC-3 (reference the stamped CONTEXT-FORMAT.md by a path inside that skill's directory) conflicted on a strict reading and required a Team Lead ruling mid-gate to reconcile. The conflict was present in the authored criteria, unsurfaced at breakdown review.

retrospective_notes.title: Record-move timing drifted behind the work
retrospective_notes.body: S7-2 and S7-4 began before their in_progress moves landed, and S7-5 went not_shipped→shipped without an in_progress beat. Work outpaced the tracker; every item landed in its correct terminal state and nothing broke, but the convention for when an issue moves to in_progress (and whether a direct not_shipped→shipped move is sanctioned) is pinned in no document.

retrospective_notes.title: Gate-reminder hooks assume the editor runs the gate
retrospective_notes.body: Builder's Stop-hook gate-reminder fired repeatedly for gates that were Team-Lead-run this sprint, and the PostToolUse:Edit reminder fired on each scribe CONTEXT.md edit mid-batch. Both hooks assume the agent making the edit also runs the gate; when gating is centralized on the Team Lead the reminders are accurate about the gate being due but misattribute who runs it, producing harmless repeated noise.

retrospective_notes.title: Every gate run passed first-submission; the consumer P1 closed same-day
retrospective_notes.body: Every gate run this sprint returned PASS with zero violations on first submission — nine recorded passes (alignment x4, code-standards x2, package-qa x3), no revision cycles all sprint. The consumer-reported P1 (EXEC-086) moved repro→fix→contract-check→shipped same-day, and the stale-twins hypothesis was confirmed in the repro and recorded in the issue's fix field.

step_log.summary: Ratified at sprint-7 open — the grill-time Setup Skill glossary addition (npm fresh-install path: `npm install to-execution` then read/follow node_modules/to-execution/SKILL.md; official skill/plugin-surface publication tracked as EXEC-085) stays as written. alignment cycle-2 PASS (2026-06-12, session_progress.json): grill-time term resolution under the SKILL.md pen rule, no open sprint at the time (sprint 6 closed 2026-06-11).
PASS — 0 violations. Chartered definition change per EXEC-086 acceptance criteria (ADR-0004 path, EXEC-069 precedent); Team Lead approved; verdict in session_progress.json.

PASS — 0 violations. hookCommandMigrated/rewriteHookCommands helpers single-purpose; CJS_HOOK_EXTENSION/LEGACY_HOOK_EXTENSION named constants; dead HOOK_COMMAND_REWRITE.replacement removed; JSDoc + truthful comments hold; verdict in session_progress.json.

PASS — 0 violations. Chartered definition change per EXEC-087 acceptance criteria (ADR-0004 path); Team Lead approved; verdict in session_progress.json.

PASS — 0 violations. readHookCommands/deadHookCommands/hookExtensionTwins/invokedHookExtension single-purpose with JSDoc; HOOK_COMMAND_SCRIPT_PATTERN in the data module; fail-closed paths hold; verdict in session_progress.json.

step_log.summary: PASS — 0 violations. 53-file manifest, idempotent re-init, pack parity; EXEC-087 checks green: custom dead command BROKEN naming command+path, deleted stamped hook BROKEN, .js/.cjs twin TWINS naming invoked extension, existing custom .js not flagged, healthy Instance neither finding exit 0; EXEC-086 contract still green; verdict in session_progress.json.

PASS — 0 violations. Every clause load-bearing; single responsibility tighter; format-doc path citations are paths not invocations per Team Lead ruling on AC-1 vs AC-3; chartered per EXEC-083 (ADR-0004); Team Lead approved; verdict in session_progress.json.

PASS — 0 violations. 53-file manifest unchanged; pack parity (SKILL.md 3.1kB in tarball); execution-grill-with-docs/ zero diff vs HEAD; CONTEXT-FORMAT.md + ADR-FORMAT.md stamp so every path step 3 names resolves; EXEC-086/087 contract checks still green; verdict in session_progress.json.

PASS — 0 violations. Three surgical glossary edits (Setup Skill Preflight parenthetical, orchestrator-analogy replacement, Setup Grill end-to-end sentence) verified factually accurate against src/SKILL.md; chartered per EXEC-084 (ADR-0004); PROCESS.md + template seeds verified already correct; Team Lead approved; verdict in session_progress.json.
PASS — 0 violations. One-sentence In-flight clause pinning record-move timing; Src-First byte-aligned pair; tied to sprint-7 retro observation 3; Team Lead approved; verdict in session_progress.json.

PASS — 0 violations. All five items shipped, companion issues closed (closed_in_sprint 7), four decisions + five retrospective notes recorded with no next-steps language, nine PASS gate runs verified; verdict in session_progress.json.
